text:
I have enough information. The roadmap contains only mathematical targets (JacobianChallenge, PDE, ReductiveGroups, UniversalCovers), and CLAUDE.md explicitly designates `.github/` as human-owned. No further reads needed.

TAUCETI-VERDICT-7968eb375ccebd143ea81b32

```json
{
  "verdict": "block",
  "summary": "This PR modifies `.github/workflows/review.yml`, which CLAUDE.md explicitly marks as human-owned infrastructure. None of the four roadmap targets (JacobianChallenge, PDE, ReductiveGroups, UniversalCovers) cover CI/workflow maintenance, and there is no plausible prerequisite path from a shell-injection fix or exact-command check to any mathematical target.",
  "findings": [
    {
      "file": ".github/workflows/review.yml",
      "line": 0,
      "issue": "Change is to human-owned CI infrastructure with no path to any roadmap target. CLAUDE.md states '`TauCeti/` is the only place code goes; everything else (`Scripts/`, `.github/`, the Lake config) is human-owned.' No roadmap file contains a node or heading that this change advances.",
      "fix": "If this security fix is worthwhile (and it likely is), a human should apply it directly; it does not belong in an AI-authored PR and need not be added to the mathematics roadmap.",
      "evidence": "CLAUDE.md line: '`TauCeti/` is the only place code goes; everything else (`Scripts/`, `.github/`, the Lake config) is human-owned.' Roadmap targets confirmed by listing /tmp/tmp.bxzA2DZHmO/roadmap/TauCetiRoadmap/: JacobianChallenge, PDE, ReductiveGroups, UniversalCovers — none related to CI/workflow."
    }
  ]
}
```

verdict_obj.summary: This PR modifies `.github/workflows/review.yml`, which CLAUDE.md explicitly marks as human-owned infrastructure. None of the four roadmap targets (JacobianChallenge, PDE, ReductiveGroups, UniversalCovers) cover CI/workflow maintenance, and there is no plausible prerequisite path from a shell-injection fix or exact-command check to any mathematical target.

findings.issue: Change is to human-owned CI infrastructure with no path to any roadmap target. CLAUDE.md states '`TauCeti/` is the only place code goes; everything else (`Scripts/`, `.github/`, the Lake config) is human-owned.' No roadmap file contains a node or heading that this change advances.
findings.fix: If this security fix is worthwhile (and it likely is), a human should apply it directly; it does not belong in an AI-authored PR and need not be added to the mathematics roadmap.
